description_long: This house features a simple rectangular structure with a flat roof and a clean, modern facade. The front side includes a large, open entryway with a tiled floor, flanked by two standard windows and a large set of floor-to-ceiling windows, suggesting a spacious living area. The rear side is more understated, with three evenly spaced windows providing natural light. The side elevations each have two windows, maintaining symmetry and allowing for cross-ventilation. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the dark, flat roof. The overall design is minimalistic, with an emphasis on functionality and open interior space.
description: A modern, rectangular single-story house with a flat roof, large open entryway, and symmetrical window placement. The facade is clean and minimalistic, featuring both standard and large windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, two standard windows, and a large set of floor-to-ceiling windows.
description_view_1: Side view with two windows, highlighting the building's depth and flat roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with three evenly spaced windows and a plain wall surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two windows, mirroring the other side.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows at the front
attribute_entryway_design: Large open entryway with tiled floor, no steps or porch, minimalistic and unobstructed
